title: Clockwork harbor narrative candidates
phaseShift: Move from repair-room tutorial into first harbor encounter while preserving human review of voice.
narrativeArc: A local mechanic discovers that the harbor machines respond to careful deck choices and explicit dialogue flags.
themeGoals: Show repair, consequence, and cautious momentum through candidate material.
Keep wit as a draft label for human selection rather than a machine verdict.
constraints: Use Milestone 39 narrative ids and Milestone 30 proposal intake only.
Do not apply or promote generated text without human selection.

narrativeSurface.boundary: rust-trusted-state; browser/studio read-only; generation proposal-only via review/apply/trust-gradient

candidates.humanIntent: Draft a beat where the player notices the harbor repair loop before a choice.
candidates.compatibilityNotes: Maps to the existing demo-story narrative surface as proposal data only.
